description: Composition White printed kurta made of lightweight 100% cotton, has a shirt collar, full front opening with buttoned placket, three quarter length sleeves gathered to buttoned cuffs, embellished panel on front with small sequins and no vents Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately in cold water Do not bleach Dry in shade Medium to hot iron A man's shirt has been reinvented as a kurta from biba – complete with button cuffs and shirt collar, but with lovely feminine details. This kurta is made of soft lightweight cotton which will keep you cool in warm weather while the bright printed flowers sing out of the white background. Wear this over leggings or over jeans depending on the occasion. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
